mapper.select: SELECT actor_id, first_name, last_name, last_update FROM actor ORDER BY first_name, last_name
SELECT actor_id, first_name, last_name, last_update FROM actor WHERE first_name ILIKE '%' || #{name} || '%' OR last_name ILIKE '%' || #{name} || '%' ORDER BY last_name, first_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO actor (first_name, last_name, last_update) VALUES (#{firstName}, #{lastName}, COALESCE(#{lastUpdate}, now())) RETURNING actor_id
mapper.update: UPDATE actor SET first_name = #{firstName}, last_name = #{lastName}, last_update = now() WHERE actor_id = #{actorId}
